name: claude-codex-subagent
description: Single-plugin marketplace for claude-codex-subagent — Codex as a pure code-writing worker.

plugins.name: claude-codex-subagent
plugins.description: Hand off code-writing to the local Codex CLI as a worker. Claude packages an 8-section brief; Codex implements + self-checks + emits a 5-section report; Claude verifies. Brief-declared sandbox tier: network (default) / workspace / system.
